rocket_talk_default:
🎙️ Rocket Talk LIVE — {{event_date}} at {{event_time}} in the Movie Theater!

Join Chris the Rocket Guy for a fun, interactive presentation about the upcoming {{mission_name}} launch aboard the {{launch_vehicle}}.

Chris profiles the rocket, the mission, and where to watch the launch from, right the resort.

All ages are welcome, but parents of very young kids should be aware that this isn't really a kid-oriented program and it may not hold the attention of very young children.

📍 Movie Theater | 🕐 {{event_time}}
